title: The EndSoul Items
description: Mod That Adds Ore And Bunch of overpowerd items to minecraft end!
body:
This mod adds a new ore that generates in the End dimension.
The ore can be mined and smelted into ingots, which are used to craft tools and armor.
The equipment made from this material is stronger and more durable than Netherite.
It is designed to give players a reason to explore the End and provides a natural upgrade path for late-game progression.

More Updates Are On The Way
